bugs.title: Checkout button crashes the page
bugs.body: Clicking the checkout button on the cart screen throws a 500 error and the entire page goes blank. Repro: add any item, go to cart, click checkout.
bugs.stack_trace:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "checkout.py", line 127
    charge(user)
TypeError: charge() got NoneType
bugs.repro_steps: 1. Add item to cart\n2. Click checkout\n3. Page crashes

bugs.title: Internal server error when paying
bugs.body: Pay-now returns a server error and the page becomes unresponsive. Same on mobile and desktop.
bugs.stack_trace:
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "checkout.py", line 127
    charge(user)
TypeError: charge() got NoneType

bugs.title: pay now blank page
bugs.body: pay now button produces blank page. happened twice today. very annoying.

bugs.title: Safari does not retain session cookie after login
bugs.body: After logging in on Safari 17 the session cookie is never set, kicking the user back to login on the next request.

bugs.title: users logged out immediately in Safari
bugs.body: Login succeeds but the user is logged out on next page load. Only affects Safari desktop.
bugs.repro_steps: 1. Open in Safari\n2. Log in\n3. Refresh — logged out

bugs.title: session cookie missing in webkit
bugs.body: webkit-based browsers fail to set the auth cookie after sign-in.

bugs.title: uploading a PNG larger than 5MB hangs
bugs.body: Uploading any PNG over 5 MB hangs the upload bar forever. No error, no progress.

bugs.title: PNG upload stuck above 5 megabytes
bugs.body: Large PNG files cause the upload to hang indefinitely. No progress and no error message ever shown.

bugs.title: dark mode renders serif font on titles
bugs.body: Switching to dark mode breaks headline font — falls back to a serif where it should be sans-serif.

bugs.title: headlines wrong font when dark theme active
bugs.body: Dark theme causes the heading font to revert to a serif typeface. Body stays sans-serif, only headlines regress.

bugs.title: search returns 500 if query contains slash
bugs.body: Searching for any term that contains a forward slash returns a 500 error.

bugs.title: 500 on search with /
bugs.body: Any search query containing the character / produces a server error.

bugs.title: push notifications duplicate fire on Android
bugs.body: On Android, push notifications fire twice for the same event. iOS is fine.

bugs.title: android push duplicates
bugs.body: android delivers the same push notification twice. iOS unaffected.

bugs.title: RTL languages clip right edge of cards
bugs.body: Arabic and Hebrew layouts clip the right edge of product cards. Looks fine in LTR.

bugs.title: product cards clipped in RTL
bugs.body: Cards have their right side cut off in right-to-left languages (Arabic/Hebrew).

bugs.title: CSV export omits last column on Windows
bugs.body: Downloaded CSV on Windows Excel is missing the last column. Other platforms fine.

bugs.title: excel drops last column from CSV export
bugs.body: The CSV download loses its last column when opened in Excel on Windows.

bugs.title: webhook retry doubles charge on flaky networks
bugs.body: Webhook retries on flaky-network response cause the customer to be charged twice.

bugs.title: customer charged twice on flaky webhook retry
bugs.body: Customer says they were billed twice because the webhook fired twice.

bugs.title: ISO8601 with Z fails to parse
bugs.body: Timestamps with a trailing Z fail to parse. Without Z works. Affects event ingest.

bugs.title: event ingest rejects UTC Z timestamps
bugs.body: Event ingest rejects ISO8601 timestamps with a trailing Z. Local time works.

bugs.title: primary button text invisible on hover
bugs.body: On hover the text inside the primary button becomes the same color as the background.

bugs.title: hovering main CTA hides label text
bugs.body: On hover, the label text of the main call-to-action button turns invisible against the background.

bugs.title: downloading report truncates after 100MB
bugs.body: Report downloads truncate beyond 100 MB without warning.

bugs.title: large report downloads silently truncated
bugs.body: Anything over 100 MB appears to silently cap when downloading a report.

bugs.title: install fails on Ubuntu 24.04
bugs.body: apt install of the linux package fails on Ubuntu 24.04 due to glibc version.

bugs.title: API endpoint /v2/users returns 404
bugs.body: /v2/users returns 404 even for active accounts.

bugs.title: billing email missing company name
bugs.body: Billing receipts omit the company name on the invoice header.

bugs.title: admin dashboard pagination off-by-one
bugs.body: Pagination links on the admin dashboard skip the last page.

bugs.title: metrics endpoint exposed to non-admins
bugs.body: Internal metrics endpoint is reachable without admin role.

bugs.title: CSV import rejects negative numbers
bugs.body: Importing a CSV with negative numeric values fails.

bugs.title: profile photo rotation lost
bugs.body: EXIF rotation is dropped on profile photo upload.

bugs.title: calendar widget missing keyboard focus ring
bugs.body: Calendar date picker has no visible focus indicator when tabbed to.
